rationale: Remove large inline search payload from echo output to reduce Windows command-line length risk while keeping search results logged to file.

edits.content:
name: chat_deep
vars:
  goal: "${ENV:BRAINFLOW_GOAL}"
  user_msg: "${ENV:BRAINFLOW_IN}"
steps:
  - name: log inbound
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "note_write"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      filename: "inbox.md"
      text: "USER: ${vars.user_msg}"
    save_as: logged

  - name: web forage (general)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "exa_search"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      query: "${vars.user_msg}"
      num_results: 5
      search_type: "fast"
    save_as: search

  - name: log search snippet
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "note_write"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      filename: "forage.md"
      text: "QUERY=${vars.user_msg} | RAW=${vars.search}"
    save_as: search_logged

  - name: draft (placeholder)
    kind: echo
    text: "DEEP_DRAFT\nGOAL=${vars.goal}\nUSER=${vars.user_msg}"
    save_as: draft

risks: Draft step no longer includes raw search payload inline; downstream consumers expecting RAW_SEARCH in echo output may lose that field.
